finding: Captain dispatch had to repeatedly add detailed stop/report instructions because task cards and ATM recovery surfaces did not reliably contain all closeout, runner-sync, WIP recovery, and evidence expectations. This causes token-heavy back-and-forth and babysitting rather than autonomous task-card execution.
expectedBehavior: Durable task cards and ATM playbooks should carry the full executable acceptance/recovery contract; dispatch packets should stay concise and task-card-referenced while still self-contained for current state.
evidenceOrRepro: Plan 3.1 dogfood required repeated manual captain instructions for 0255 closeout, 0258 emergency WIP preservation, 0257 emergency WIP preservation, and 0260 claim/dependency recovery. The user explicitly corrected dispatch format and token balance rules.
followUp: Continue enforcing the updated atm-dispatch token-economy/copy-paste packet rule and audit Plan3.1/Plan3.2 cards for missing recovery/report fields.
